rulings.Case Title: BISHOP DONALD PIPKINS, AN INDIVIDUAL et al VS. HOMEQ CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 18, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege in good faith Ocwen's wrong doing as to causes of action 1 and 2. Sustain without leave to amend as to causes of action 3 and 4. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERLINDA HERNANDEZ VS. ONEWEST BANK, FSB
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Reconsider Under Code Of Civil Procedure 1008(A)
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 18, 2012. Line 2 - PLAINTIFF HERLINDA HERNANDEZ's Motion To Reconsider Under Code Of Civil Procedure 1008(A). Deny, plaintiff failed to establish burden re 1008. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VYSOTA ENTERPRISES, INC. VS. U.S. BANK, N.A., FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 18, 2012. Line 3 - Temporary restraining order and order to show cause re preliminary injunction. Off calendar, no bond posted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLGA BIASOTTI VS. WILLIAM WEAVER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 18, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT WILLIAM WEAVER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Hearing required to address why notice not fatally defective. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS SUCCESSOR VS. ANGEL DOE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 18, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT HEATHER WAGNER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, 5 days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAUREL GARDEN APARTMENTS VS. ESTHER C NNADI
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 18, 2012. Line 6 - DEFENDANT ESTHER NNADI's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continue to July 25, 2012 plaintiff to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and defendant to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C by July 19, 2012 4:00pm. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARA C ANGULO VS. ERIC J ARGUELLO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Moneatry Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 18, 2012. Line 7 - PLAINTIFF SARA ANGULO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Moneatry Sanctions. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)
